title: The Screwtape Letters
author: C.S. Lewis
description: "The Screwtape Letters" by C.S. Lewis is a thought-provoking and satirical work that takes the form of a series of letters from a senior demon, Screwtape, to his nephew, Wormwood, who is a junior tempter. Through these letters, Screwtape provides guidance on the art of tempting and leading humans away from virtue and into the clutches of Hell. As the letters unfold, readers gain insight into the subtle tactics used by demons to exploit human weaknesses, distract them from spiritual growth, and u...
